prompt:
Create a 4x3 grid collage of the SAME handsome young man from the reference image, maintaining identical facial features, hairstyle, beard, body type, and skin tone across all 12 panels. Each panel should show him wearing a DIFFERENT football jersey from famous clubs around the world, including Liverpool, Real Madrid, Barcelona, Manchester United, etc.

Use different natural poses in every panel: sitting casually, leaning back, arms crossed, adjusting jersey collar, thoughtful pose, smiling slightly, standing confidently, hands in pockets, etc. Keep the overall vibe stylish, modern, and masculine.

Studio photoshoot aesthetic with soft neutral gray background, soft diffused lighting, realistic skin texture, highly detailed fabric, fashion editorial quality, ultra realistic, consistent identity in all panels, clean composition, balanced spacing between frames.
